name: Spatial Base
description: Foundational geographic and boundary layers — topography, bathymetry, administrative boundaries, coastlines, EEZs, and built infrastructure.

name: Meteorology & Climate
description: Atmospheric variables — temperature, precipitation, wind, pressure, cloud cover, reanalysis products, and seasonal forecasts.

name: Hydrology & Water
description: Surface and subsurface water systems — river basins, discharge, groundwater, flood extents, reservoirs, and water quality.

name: Environment & Hazards
description: Land cover, vegetation indices, air quality, seismicity, volcanic activity, wildfire risk, and environmental change indicators.
